situational_context: Running comeback week 5: 6 runs completed since May 3 (gap broken after 182 days). Run #6 today: 3.78 km (shortened from 5 km plan), HR avg 140, Z2 — well-executed but consolidation at 5 km still incomplete (Runs #4-5 at 5 km, #6 cut short). VO2max running improved to 39.4 (from 38.9). Primary modality remains e-bike commuting (~38 km/day), but volume reduced over past 10 days due to congés (May 29) and canicule (May 30), causing chronic load to drop from 22.3 to 15.7 (detraining territory). ACWR 0.78 — just below the 0.80 floor. Two sur site days upcoming (June 4-5) will restore commuting volume. HRV stable BALANCED (36 weekly avg), RHR improved to 48.6 bpm. Weight declining steadily: 102.97 kg (vs 104.1 on May 14), -1.81 kg over 28 days. Sleep adequate at 7.55h 7d avg. No new labs since Dec 2025. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Continue 5 km consolidation: Run #7 (Wed June 3) and Run #8 (Sun June 7) at 5 km Z1-Z2. Run #6 was cut short at 3.78 km — need 3 consecutive full 5 km runs before increasing distance. Maintain ≥48h between runs.
recommendations.measurable: Run #7 and #8 completed at 5 km, no post-run pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Restore commuting volume to arrest chronic load decline (-30% in 17 days). The two sur site days (June 4-5) will naturally restore load. Continue ebike commuting on all office days. If taking gravel on sur site days (suffer >15), scale back the Saturday gravel ride accordingly.
recommendations.measurable: Chronic load stabilizes above 15.5 by June 7

recommendations.text: Maintain eccentric calf raises 3×/week and daily Vitamin D supplementation. Weight trajectory excellent at -1.81 kg/28d (102.97 kg). Protein intake averaging 130g/day vs 150g target — prioritize protein at lunch.
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 calf-raise sessions; protein ≥140g/day avg; weight ≤103 kg at next weigh-in

markers_to_watch.reason: Dropped from 22.3 to 15.7 in 17 days; at 0.98% of historical peak. Commuting resumption should arrest the decline.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if rises >5 bpm above 48.6 bpm for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: RHR has improved to 48.6; elevation would indicate overload during comeback

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: At 102.97 kg body weight, tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck
